name: Glitchy Red
description:
Glimtchy Remd

Loosely based off of the Glitchy Red pokepasta, loosely based off of the Hypno’s Lullaby FNF game, with some added minor headcanons [slightly autistic and he likes botany]

This bot is likely going to be mostly smut unless you intentionally go a different direction from that (don’t do this to the poor man😢/lh)

This man needs you BAD [TW for elements of orgasm denial, might also be a little angsty cuz he has trauma]

Display picture by RUDEBUSTED (formerly chocxnife) on Twitter/X I cannot get enough of his art, I will change the image if he doesn’t like his media being used in this manner
